introSection: Roller Coaster Mayan is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Energylandia in Zator, Małopolskie, Poland. It is a Suspended Looping Coaster built by Vekoma. It had a virtual reality experience in 2017.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: At some point, the coaster received new trains with vest harnesses.

fullText:
Roller Coaster Mayan is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Energylandia in Zator, Małopolskie, Poland. It is a Suspended Looping Coaster built by Vekoma. It had a virtual reality experience in 2017.



At some point, the coaster received new trains with vest harnesses.
